data.title: U.S. Money Reserve in Austin, TX maintains BBB accreditation for another year, a key recognition for standards compliance.
data.description: In Austin, Texas on February 19, 2026, U.S. Money Reserve, a leading private distributor of precious metals in the United States, proudly announces its reaccreditation by the Better Business Bureau (BBB) for another year. The BBB, a nonprofit organization focused on maintaining high standards in the marketplace, has recognized U.S. Money Reserve's commitment to excellence in its industry.

data.title: Melissa Fields Tugwell wins 2025 Silver Stevie® Award for Lifetime Achievement at the prestigious Stevie® Awards for Women in Business.
data.description: In Spring, Texas on February 19, 2026, Melissa Fields Tugwell was honored with the Silver Stevie® Award for Lifetime Achievement at the renowned Stevie® Awards for Women in Business. This achievement is a testament to the high standard of excellence upheld at Golden Hour. Melissa's remarkable accomplishment highlights the commitment to exceptional performance, with the organization having been lauded for its dedication to success over nearly [number] years.

data.title: Flooring expert Mike Westfall advises addressing small flooring issues early to prevent bigger problems.
data.description: In Penn Yan, New York on February 19, 2026, Mike Westfall from Church Creative Flooring, Inc. warned about the consequences of neglecting minor issues in your home. He emphasized the importance of addressing small cracks in tiles or creaks in floorboards promptly. According to him, these seemingly insignificant problems can escalate into major structural issues if ignored. This advice was shared in a HelloNation article, highlighting the significance of timely maintenance to prevent costly repairs.

data.title: i-80 Gold Corp. reports $21.3M revenue in Q4 from 5,477 oz gold sales at $3,887/oz. Full year revenue at $95.2M from 28,196 oz gold sales. Cash used in operating activities increased to $34.3M in Q4. Net loss rose to $85.6M in Q4 due to non-cash fair value revaluations. Company anticipates transformational growth in 2026 through various projects. Recapitalization plan to focus on funding development plans with $500M financing package. Future targets include ramping up production, refurbishment of Lone Tree Plant, and advancing technical and permitting work on projects. Outlook for 2026 includes production guidance, operating costs, and various expenditures. Key catalysts expected in the next 12-18 months for the Company's gold portfolio.
data.description: i-80 Gold Corp. reported its financial results for Q4 and full year 2025, with revenue in Q4 at $21.3 million from 5,477 gold ounces, a gross profit of $4.7 million, and a net loss of $85.6 million. For the full year, revenue reached $95.2 million, with gold sales of 28,196 ounces and gross profit at $11.5 million. The company increased drilling activity to 37,000 meters and achieved 31,930 gold ounces in production, surpassing 2025 guidance. i-80 Gold is focusing on a three-phased development plan, aiming to become a mid-tier gold producer by early 2030s. The company has secured a financing package of up to $500 million to fund phases one and two, which include ramping up production and refurbishing processing facilities. The company's 2026 production guidance outlines various cost and development plans for its projects. i-80 Gold aims to continue technical studies and deliver key catalysts for its gold portfolio in the upcoming months.

data.title: Alliant Energy reports $3.14 GAAP EPS for 2025, up from $2.69 in 2024. Ongoing EPS for 2025 was $3.22, compared to $3.04 in 2024.
data.description: In Madison, Wisconsin, Alliant Energy Corporation (NASDAQ: LNT) reported its unaudited 2025 earnings per share (EPS) under U.S. GAAP as $3.14, up from $2.69 in 2024. The ongoing EPS for 2025 stood at $3.22, compared to $3.04 in 2024. The company confirmed its 2026 consolidated ongoing EPS guidance in the range of $3.36 to $3.46. Alliant Energy has maintained a consistent track record of over 6% compound annual earnings growth for more than a decade.

data.title: Altisource Portfolio Solutions S.A. to announce Q4 2025 earnings on March 4, 2026. Check website for details.
data.description: Luxembourg-based Altisource Portfolio Solutions S.A. is scheduled to release its fourth quarter 2025 earnings on Wednesday, March 4, 2026. The company, traded on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol ASPS, will make the earnings report, along with a presentation, accessible on its website in the Investor Relations segment.

data.title: Caroline Camfield recognized by The Inner Circle as a Pinnacle Professional Member for Residential Real Estate.
data.description: In Santa Teresa, New Mexico on February 19, 2026, Caroline Camfield has been acknowledged as a distinguished member of The Inner Circle for her achievements in Residential Real Estate. Specifically, she has been designated as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence. Caroline Camfield is being celebrated for her significant contributions in this field, which span almost two years.

data.title: Tonya M. Esposito appointed as At-Large Member of USTA Mid-Atlantic Foundation Board. Washington DC lawyer joins as board member.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, Tonya M. Esposito, an administrative shareholder at the Washington, D.C., branch of the worldwide law company Greenberg Traurig, LLP, and co-leader of the Antitrust Litigation & Competition Regulation Practice, was named an at-large member of a committee.

data.title: Borco U.S.A. acquires Permian-based well service company with 3 active rigs, enhancing vertical integration.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, in Dallas, an independent oil and gas exploration and production firm, Borco U.S.A. ("Borco"), disclosed its purchase of a Permian-focused well service business with three operational well service rigs. This move bolsters Borco's vertical integration strategy and enhances its position in the market.

data.title: Hospitality expert Theresa Lobaugh advises on choosing a temporary home in Great Falls, MT for a smooth transition.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, in Great Falls, Montana, an article from HelloNation suggests key factors to consider when relocating to the area and looking for temporary housing. The focus is on finding a place that offers a blend of comfort, flexibility, and convenience to make the transition smoother.

data.title: Kentucky Supreme Court overturns state's charter school law in poorly reasoned opinion, impacting quality public schools.
data.description: In a controversial decision on February 19, 2026, the Kentucky Supreme Court deemed the state's charter school law invalid, marking a significant setback for the charter school movement after 35 years. This ruling will impact Kentucky students, leading to a reduction in the availability of high-quality public school options.

data.title: DuPont declares $0.20 dividend per share on Common Stock, payable on March 16, 2026.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, in Wilmington, Delaware, DuPont (NYSE: DD) revealed a dividend declaration for its shareholders. The Board of Directors stated a quarterly dividend of $0.20 per share for the outstanding Common Stock of the Company (with a par value of $0.01 per share). Shareholders can anticipate this dividend payment on March 16, 2026.

data.title: Denarius Metals partners with ProGrowth Ltd. for mining projects in Saudi Arabia. Cboe CA: DMET, OTCQX: DNRSF.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, Denarius Metals Corp. (Cboe CA: DMET) (OTCQX: DNRSF) disclosed a significant development as they partnered with ProGrowth Ltd. Company ("ProGrowth"), a Saudi Arabian conglomerate. This collaboration marks a strategic joint venture between the two companies.

data.title: Gold Royalty Corp increases revolving credit facility to $150 million, reduces interest cost, updates portfolio assets.
data.description: Gold Royalty Corp. based in Vancouver, BC, disclosed on Feb. 19, 2026, that the Company has expanded and modified its current credit facility to a potential limit of US$150 million. This extension was agreed upon with a consortium of lenders. The company, listed on NYSE American as GROY, expressed satisfaction with this development.

data.title: RYBREVANT FASPRO™ combo + immunotherapy yields 56% overall response rate in head & neck cancer; 10% complete response; surpasses standard care.
data.description: Johnson & Johnson announced promising findings from the Phase 1b/2 OrigAMI-4 study on Feb. 19, 2026. RYBREVANT FASPRO™ demonstrated a remarkable 10% complete response rate, along with rapid and lasting antitumor effects surpassing current treatment norms. This development signifies a significant advancement in cancer care and showcases the potential of this treatment. These results mark a notable achievement in the medical field, highlighting the effectiveness of RYBREVANT FASPRO™ in combating tumors.

data.title: Ontario Gov't nominee Deb Hutton joins Hydro One's Board of Directors, filling vacancy left by Cherie Brant.
data.description: In a recent announcement, Hydro One Limited revealed that the Government of Ontario's selected nominee, Deb Hutton, has officially joined the company's Board of Directors as of today. The appointment of Ms. Hutton comes as a result of a board vacancy that arose when Cherie Brant decided not to continue in the position. This change is effective immediately as of February 19, 2026.

data.title: AES named top clean energy provider to US and Americas in 2025, ranked as leading seller to corporations for 5th year.
data.description: For the fifth consecutive year, The AES Corporation (NYSE: AES) has been recognized as the leading seller of clean energy to corporations in the United States and the Americas in 2025. The company, based in Arlington, Virginia, has maintained its top position as it continues to drive the adoption of renewable energy sources. This achievement underscores AES's strong commitment to sustainable practices and its success in providing clean energy solutions to corporate clients. With this recognition, AES solidifies its position as a key player in the clean energy sector, contributing significantly to the transition towards a more sustainable energy landscape.

data.title: Dr. Ben Nemmers discusses the importance of grooming for pet health in HelloNation article.
data.description: In Cedar Falls, Iowa, on February 19, 2026, Dr. Ben Nemmers from Companion Animal Clinic & Pet Resort discusses the significance of dog grooming beyond aesthetics. According to Dr. Nemmers, grooming contributes significantly to long-term pet health. This indicates that maintaining a proper grooming routine for dogs is crucial for their overall well-being.

data.title: Investigation launched into Coty's $126.9 million loss and missed earnings expectations for Q2 2026.
data.description: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP is currently conducting an investigation on Coty Inc. (NYSE: COTY) as per the recent report released by the company. The disclosed figures show a net loss of $126.9 million for the second quarter of fiscal year 2026. Additionally, the non-GAAP earnings per share were reported to be $0.14, which is $0.04 lower than expected.
